LanguageData.UB_SNS_ChildEngineer.title: Vent crawler
LanguageData.UB_SNS_ChildEngineer.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born aboard a tightly-packed gravship with barely any room for them. [PAWN_pronoun] would commonly spend any time not doing chores inside of the ships ventilation system reading books, doodling, and messing with random wires and cables into little gadgets and doo-dads.
